text.tspan: Drag icon between spaces to insert new text
Designed for mobile first. Extending to desktop will be much easier.
Tap to create new text also

tspan.tspan: Paizo Prolog is designed to keep the answers in view at all times. This is
important because it is easy to forget all the facts and rules written as the
program increases. When going to do questioning, this is even more
important, since you can only ask questions that make sense in the context
This means there will be a lot of overlays. It is also designed to make
use of swiping as its a more natural motion on touch screens to achieve
